text: Can we add a note about modified tummy time for babies with reflux? I've been using this a lot with patients.
Great call - adding a sidebar callout. Will note 30-min post-feed wait rule.
Ch5 balance section is the strongest chapter so far. The beam-walk progression is exactly what parents need.
Beta cohort confirmed - 8 parent volunteers from church and running group. Sending Ch1-3 week of November 10.
Standing progression in 4.3 is great. Suggest adding cue about not holding breath - kids do this a lot when concentrating.
Perfect catch - adding breathing cue in the next pass. Also adding 'sing a silly song' tip to make it playful.
Reviewed Ch1 preview as requested. Very accessible language. The neurological connection paragraph is a keeper.
Target: ask Dr. Whitfield after Kestrel Nov review cycle. Good natural timing.
Lauren's feedback from Mar 10 dinner is spot on - Ch2 reads clearly even for someone with no PT background.
Vimeo links to add: crocodile crawl demo, assisted stand demo, prop sitting demo. All filmed in March.
Tony (SLP at Kestrel) reviewed Ch1 - loved it. Suggested adding a note about oral motor exercises in Ch2 intro.
Ch6 warning signs section - need Sarah to review clinical accuracy before finalizing. Especially the motor regression red flags.
Red flags list looks accurate. Suggest adding 'loss of previously mastered skills' - that's a big one families miss.
Best sprint in a month. Hamstring held up for the morning run and still had energy to write for 2hrs.
Pitch deck draft done. Key hook: guide reduces parent re-question calls by ~30% based on anecdotal data from beta testers.
Torticollis feedback noted. Adding visual cue insert to Ch3. Will run it by Sarah before publishing.
Ch2 supplies list - added links to affordable foam mats on Amazon. Parents asked for specific product recs.
Ch5 clinical review done. All exercises are age-appropriate and safe. One note: label difficulty levels for each activity.
Simplified all exercise names in Ch3 per this feedback. Used Lauren's plain-language bank. Re-sending beta copy.
Columbus Peds Parent Group contact info: Sylvie Broussard at clintonvillecommunitygarden.org can intro. Follow up in October.
